name: @block-agent/app-stats
description: stats BlockApp: a pure consumer that folds message_count + task_count into a one-line overview (default-disabled; end-to-end contract verifier).
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-stats/manifest.js'.

blockAgent.summary: 概览：按契约汇总消息数与待办数，默认隐藏。
